name: TA Fultonville

name: Indian Castle Service Area

description: NY Thruway (I-90) westbound service area (Applegreen) with Mobil diesel, a C-Store, Starbucks, Burger King and Chick-fil-A, restrooms and truck parking, in Herkimer County.

description: 24-hour heavy-duty truck towing, recovery and repair serving the I-90 Amsterdam corridor, in business since 1984.

name: Frank's Heavy Duty Truck Repairs
